name: sinistea
flavor_texts: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.
The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation.
text: Sinistea is the Black Tea Pokémon. It is a ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: weak-armor, cursed-body (hidden). Base stats — HP: 40, Attack: 45, Defense: 45, Sp. Atk: 74, Sp. Def: 54, Speed: 50. Evolution line: sinistea → polteageist. Lore: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea. The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation.
